message:
test: Display variant coverage for GovernorReason, ProfileValidationError, SafeChannelError

- connector_governor: 5 missing GovernorReason variants (GlobalRateLimit, ConnectorQuotaExhausted, GlobalQuotaExhausted, BudgetExceeded, Backpressure)
- session_profiles: 7 missing ProfileValidationError variants (SlotRefNotFound, DuplicateSlotLabel, InvalidSlotWeight, EmptyProgramMixTarget, InvalidProgramMixWeight, DuplicateProgramMixTarget, EmptyBootstrapCommand)
- safe_channel: all 6 SafeChannelError variants + Error trait conformance

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
